---
title: "Heritage Index of Economic Freedom"
editor: visual
---

# Heritage Index of Economic Freedom

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(flextable)
library(stringr)
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

## 2025

```{r}
# Read in Dataset and Clean
heritage_index <- read_csv("heritage-index-of-economic-freedom-2026-03-25_1950.csv")
heritage_index <- clean_names(heritage_index)

# Subsetted Dataframe with Relevant Countries
heritage_2025 <- heritage_index %>% 
  filter(index_year == 2026) %>% 
    filter(country %in% c('Ghana', 
                          'Nigeria',
                          "Côte d'Ivoire",
                          'Senegal',
                          'Cameroon',
                          'Togo',
                          'Sierra Leone',
                          'Liberia',
                          'United States'))
```

Below are bar graphs that compare each Economic Index given the list of counties\

```{r}

# ======== Overall Score ========

heritage_2025 %>%
  mutate(overall_score = as.numeric(overall_score)) %>% 
  arrange(overall_score) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = overall_score, y = reorder(country, overall_score))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7FE8D7") +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = round(overall_score, 1)), 
            hjust = -0.1, 
            color = "#7FE8D7",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Overall Score by Country",
    x = "Overall Score",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# ======== Property Rights ========

heritage_2025 %>%
  mutate(property_rights = as.numeric(property_rights)) %>% 
  arrange(property_rights) %>%   # sort for clean visual
  ggplot(aes(x = property_rights, y = reorder(country, property_rights))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7FE8D7") +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = round(property_rights, 1)), 
            hjust = -0.1, 
            color = "#7FE8D7",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "property_rights by Country",
    x = "property_rights",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# ======== Government Integrity ========

heritage_2025 %>%
  mutate(government_integrity = as.numeric(government_integrity)) %>% 
  arrange(government_integrity) %>%   # sort for clean visual
  ggplot(aes(x = government_integrity, y = reorder(country, government_integrity))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7FE8D7") +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = round(government_integrity, 1)), 
            hjust = -0.1, 
            color = "#7FE8D7",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "government_integrity by Country",
    x = "government_integrity",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# ======== Judicial Effectiveness ========

heritage_2025 %>%
  mutate(judicial_effectiveness = as.numeric(judicial_effectiveness)) %>% 
  arrange(judicial_effectiveness) %>%   # sort for clean visual
  ggplot(aes(x = judicial_effectiveness, y = reorder(country, judicial_effectiveness))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7FE8D7") +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = round(judicial_effectiveness, 1)), 
            hjust = -0.1, 
            color = "#7FE8D7",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "judicial_effectiveness by Country",
    x = "judicial_effectiveness",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# ======== Tax Burdens ========

heritage_2025 %>%
  mutate(tax_burden = as.numeric(tax_burden)) %>% 
  arrange(tax_burden) %>%   # sort for clean visual
  ggplot(aes(x = tax_burden, y = reorder(country, tax_burden))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7FE8D7") +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = round(tax_burden, 1)), 
            hjust = -0.1, 
            color = "#7FE8D7",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "tax_burden by Country",
    x = "tax_burden",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# ======== Government Spending ========

heritage_2025 %>%
  mutate(government_spending = as.numeric(government_spending)) %>% 
  arrange(government_spending) %>%   # sort for clean visual
  ggplot(aes(x = government_spending, y = reorder(country, government_spending))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7FE8D7") +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = round(government_spending, 1)), 
            hjust = -0.1, 
            color = "#7FE8D7",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "government_spending by Country",
    x = "government_spending",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# ======== Fiscal Health ========

heritage_2025 %>%
  mutate(fiscal_health = as.numeric(fiscal_health)) %>% 
  arrange(fiscal_health) %>%   # sort for clean visual
  ggplot(aes(x = fiscal_health, y = reorder(country, fiscal_health))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7FE8D7") +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = round(fiscal_health, 1)), 
            hjust = -0.1, 
            color = "#7FE8D7",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "fiscal_health by Country",
    x = "fiscal_health",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# ======== Business Freedom ========

heritage_2025 %>%
  mutate(business_freedom = as.numeric(business_freedom)) %>% 
  arrange(business_freedom) %>%   # sort for clean visual
  ggplot(aes(x = business_freedom, y = reorder(country, business_freedom))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7FE8D7") +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = round(business_freedom, 1)), 
            hjust = -0.1, 
            color = "#7FE8D7",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "business_freedom by Country",
    x = "business_freedom",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# ======== Labor Freedom ========

heritage_2025 %>%
  mutate(labor_freedom = as.numeric(labor_freedom)) %>% 
  arrange(labor_freedom) %>%   # sort for clean visual
  ggplot(aes(x = labor_freedom, y = reorder(country, labor_freedom))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7FE8D7") +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = round(labor_freedom, 1)), 
            hjust = -0.1, 
            color = "#7FE8D7",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "labor_freedom by Country",
    x = "labor_freedom",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# ======== Monetary Freedom ========

heritage_2025 %>%
  mutate(monetary_freedom = as.numeric(monetary_freedom)) %>% 
  arrange(monetary_freedom) %>%   # sort for clean visual
  ggplot(aes(x = monetary_freedom, y = reorder(country, monetary_freedom))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7FE8D7") +

  geom_text(aes(label = round(monetary_freedom, 1)), 
            hjust = -0.1, 
            color = "#7FE8D7",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "monetary_freedom by Country",
    x = "monetary_freedom",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# ======== Trade Freedom ========

heritage_2025 %>%
  mutate(trade_freedom = as.numeric(trade_freedom)) %>% 
  arrange(trade_freedom) %>%   # sort for clean visual
  ggplot(aes(x = trade_freedom, y = reorder(country, trade_freedom))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7FE8D7") +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = round(trade_freedom, 1)), 
            hjust = -0.1, 
            color = "#7FE8D7",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "trade_freedom by Country",
    x = "trade_freedom",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# ======== Investment Freedom ========

heritage_2025 %>%
  mutate(investment_freedom = as.numeric(investment_freedom)) %>% 
  arrange(investment_freedom) %>%   # sort for clean visual
  ggplot(aes(x = investment_freedom, y = reorder(country, investment_freedom))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7FE8D7") +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = round(investment_freedom, 1)), 
            hjust = -0.1, 
            color = "#7FE8D7",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "investment_freedom by Country",
    x = "investment_freedom",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# ======== Financial Freedom ========

heritage_2025 %>%
  mutate(financial_freedom = as.numeric(financial_freedom)) %>% 
  arrange(financial_freedom) %>%   # sort for clean visual
  ggplot(aes(x = financial_freedom, y = reorder(country, financial_freedom))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7FE8D7") +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = round(financial_freedom, 1)), 
            hjust = -0.1, 
            color = "#7FE8D7",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "financial_freedom by Country",
    x = "financial_freedom",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

```

## Timeseries

```{r}
# Read in Dataset and Clean
heritage_index <- read_csv("heritage-index-of-economic-freedom-2026-03-25_1950.csv")
heritage_index <- clean_names(heritage_index)

# Subsetted Dataframe with Relevant Countries
heritage_time <- heritage_index %>% 
    filter(country %in% c('Ghana', 
                          'Nigeria',
                          "Côte d'Ivoire",
                          'Senegal',
                          'Cameroon',
                          'Togo',
                          'Sierra Leone',
                          'Liberia',
                          'United States'))
```

```{r}
heritage_time %>%
  mutate(overall_score = as.numeric(overall_score)) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = index_year, y = overall_score, color = country, group = country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1995, 2026, 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Heritage Index of Economic Freedom Over Time",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Overall Score",
    color = "Country"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```

```{r}
plot_heritage_by_variable <- function(country_name, data) {
  
  heritage_vars <- c("overall_score", "property_rights", "government_integrity", 
                     "judicial_effectiveness", "tax_burden", "government_spending",
                     "fiscal_health", "business_freedom", "labor_freedom", 
                     "monetary_freedom", "trade_freedom", "investment_freedom", 
                     "financial_freedom")
  
  for (var in heritage_vars) {
    
    p <- data %>%
      filter(country == country_name) %>%
      mutate(score = as.numeric(.data[[var]])) %>%
      
      ggplot(aes(x = index_year, y = score)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "#7FE8D7") +
      geom_point(size = 2, color = "#7FE8D7") +
      
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1995, 2026, 2)) +
      scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
      
      labs(
        title = paste(str_to_title(gsub("_", " ", var)), "-", country_name),
        x = "Year",
        y = "Score"
      ) +
      
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
      )
    
    print(p)
  }
}
```

### Ghana

```{r}
plot_heritage_by_variable("Ghana", heritage_time)
```

### Nigeria

```{r}
plot_heritage_by_variable("Nigeria", heritage_time)
```

### Côte d'Ivoire

```{r}
plot_heritage_by_variable("Côte d'Ivoire", heritage_time)
```

### Senegal

```{r}
plot_heritage_by_variable("Senegal", heritage_time)
```

### Cameroon

```{r}
plot_heritage_by_variable("Cameroon", heritage_time)
```

### Togo

```{r}
plot_heritage_by_variable("Togo", heritage_time)
```

### Sierra Leone

```{r}
plot_heritage_by_variable("Sierra Leone", heritage_time)
```

### Liberia

```{r}
plot_heritage_by_variable("Liberia", heritage_time)
```

:::
